ORDER ON ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE.ON JAN.20, 2005 THE COURT SUSTAINED THE DEMURRER AND GRANTED THE MOTION TO STRIKE REFERENCE TO EMOTIONAL DISTRESS BY ORDER ISSUED ON FEB. 3, 2005. PETITIONER TIMELY APPEALED TO THE COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE CALIFORNIA, FIRST APPEALATE DISTRICT. THE COURT HEREBY STRIKES THE FEB.3, 2005 ORDER. DAVID HANDSHER'S DEMURRER IS HEREBY OVERRULED AND THE MOTION TO EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS DENIED. SO ORDERED.
